faq.heading: Straight Answers
faq.subtitle: The questions every business owner asks before talking to us.
faq.q1: What’s the catch with the free website?
faq.a1: There is none. We’re building five free websites for early clients to establish our portfolio. No hidden fees, no upsells, no lock-in.
faq.q2: Who owns the website when you’re done?
faq.a2: You do — fully. All source code, content, images, and domain access transfer to you on delivery. We don’t hold anything hostage.
faq.q3: How long does it take to build?
faq.a3: Typically 2–3 weeks from the moment we align on design direction. We move fast because speed matters for a young business.
faq.q4: What if I want changes later?
faq.a4: Small content edits are easy — we’ll show you how. For larger changes, we offer monthly retainer plans, but you’re never obligated.
faq.q5: Do I need to know anything technical?
faq.a5: No. We handle domains, hosting, SSL, SEO setup, and Google Business — everything. You focus on your business; we handle the digital side.
faq.a6: Because we give each build full attention. Once the first five case studies are live, pricing returns to normal. First come, first served.
